subject: Re: Fwd: letter to Krischer
body:
no Roy wasn't involved,, but guy fronstein shouold have a copy,,, IT was delevered and or written around DEc 29 05

----- Original Message ----
From: "kellens@earthlink.net" <kellens@earthlink.net>
To: J J <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Saturday, October 21, 2006 1:21:18 PM
Subject: Fw: Fwd: letter to Krischer

Should I ask Roy if he has it?

Sent via BlackBerry from Cingular Wireless  



-----Original Message-----

From: "Alan M. Dershowitz" <dersh@law.harvard.edu>

Date: Fri, 20 Oct 2006 16:58:40 

To:kellens@earthlink.net

Cc:dersh@law.harvard.edu, avid@mycingular.blackberry.net

Subject: Fwd: letter to Krischer





Sarah,



I just spoke with Alan and he says that he thinks it was Roy Black who 

wrote the letter explaining Riley.



Best,

Mitch



>Date: Fri, 20 Oct 2006 16:26:47 -0400

>To: kellens@earthlink.net

>From: "Alan M. Dershowitz" <dersh@law.harvard.edu>

>Subject: letter to Krischer

>Cc: avid@mycingular.blackberry.net,

>

>

>Sarah,

>

>Neither Nichele nor I can find an e-mail or file to Mr. Krischer 

>explaining the confusion and accusation over Riley.  At the time, Alan was 

>speaking fairly regularly with Krischer.  It's likely that he communicated 

>the explanation orally.

>

>I'm "cc'ing" Alan on this so that he can confirm or refute.

>

>Sincerely,

>

>Mitch

Date: Fri, 20 Oct 2006 16:26:47 -0400

To: kellens@earthlink.net

From: "Alan M. Dershowitz" dersh@law.harvard.edu

Subject: letter to Krischer

Cc: avid@mycingular.blackberry.net,

Sarah,

Neither Nichele nor I can find an e-mail or file to Mr. Krischer

explaining the confusion and accusation over Riley. At the time, Alan was

speaking fairly regularly with Krischer. It's likely that he communicated

the explanation orally.

I'm "cc'ing" Alan on this so that he can confirm or refute.

Sincerely,

Mitch
